center.name: 格尔瓦尔专区
center.summary: 格尔瓦尔专区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括黃魚鴞、黑喉毛脚燕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the Himalayan foothills from Kashmir and Garhwal east to the mountains in Laos, Vietnam and southern China up to Zhejiang and Anhui

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nipalense breeds in the Himalayas from Garhwal east through Nepal, north-eastern India and Bangladesh as far as western Myanmar
